description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular main structure and an attached outdoor area featuring a pool, patio furniture, and a covered carport or garage. The house exterior is finished in a light, neutral color with subtle texturing, and it includes several windows and a main entry door with a small awning. The backyard area is well-appointed, including a round above-ground pool, a shaded pergola, and a separate shed or outbuilding. The roof of the main house is flat, while the carport and shed have simple gable roofs. The property is bordered by a paved driveway and walkways, providing access to the main entrance and outdoor amenities. The overall design is functional and modern, with an emphasis on outdoor living and convenience.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, attached carport, backyard pool, and patio area, finished in light neutral tones. The property includes a separate shed and is surrounded by paved walkways and driveways.
description_view_0: This view highlights the backyard with the pool, patio furniture, pergola, and the shed, as well as the main house's flat roof and carport.
description_view_1: This angle shows the side of the house with the carport, main entry door with awning, and a clear view of the driveway leading to the property.
description_view_2: This perspective focuses on the rear of the house, showcasing the pool, patio, and the shed, with the main house structure in the background.
description_view_3: This view presents the front of the house, including the carport, main entrance, and the driveway, with the backyard amenities visible behind.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of small and medium-sized windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a single door with a small awning, steps, and direct access from the driveway; no porch or columns.
